description: Style Note arrow woman caters to every fashionista. This top is a favourite amongst those who enjoy wearing stylish casual tops. Pair it with slim fitted jeans and wear a pair of strappy sandals to make a style statement that is in with the current trends!Product Details Cream tank top with round neckline, has layered ruffles around the neckline, sleeveless, a sequined branding with the trademark A near the hemline and a key hole detail at the nape of the neckMaterial and Care 96% viscose and 4% lycra Hand wash cold using a mild detergent with like colours Do not bleachDo not iron on print or embellishmentsDo no wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeUse cold iron  b> Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8"and chest 33") is wearing a size MStyle Note  arrow Woman caters to every fashionista.
